message:
chore(checksums): refresh dcg installer sha256 and regenerate header

Updates the pinned sha256 for the
destructive_command_guard install.sh from
d624a33b...d33569b1062146eb98a5486995defa304b55934 to
0b9af2a5...4b9e5114e24ad5696e91ccd4efecc6fed7c4ff7a, matching the
current contents of
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/main/install.sh
after the recent dcg release that added unlink/truncate/shred
destructive-command coverage. Without this bump, the ACFS installer's
integrity gate would refuse to fetch the dcg installer (it pins the
sha256 to detect supply-chain tampering) and dcg would silently be
skipped on fresh provisions.

Also regenerates the auto-generated header timestamp to
2026-04-28T21:29:12-04:00 (this is the value emitted by
`./scripts/lib/security.sh --update-checksums`; the timezone offset
is the host's local TZ at the time of regeneration).

Drops the trailing blank line at EOF that the regenerator removed.

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# checksums.yaml - Auto-generated 2026-04-27T19:30:40+00:00
+# checksums.yaml - Auto-generated 2026-04-28T21:29:12-04:00
 # Run: ./scripts/lib/security.sh --update-checksums
 
 installers:
@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ installers:
 
   dcg:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard/main/install.sh"
-    sha256: "d624a33bb7b11de88039707f4d33569b1062146eb98a5486995defa304b55934"
+    sha256: "0b9af2a5632d97a4e412475e4b9e5114e24ad5696e91ccd4efecc6fed7c4ff7a"
 
   dsr:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/doodlestein_self_releaser/main/install.sh"
@@ -165,4 +165,3 @@ installers:
   zoxide:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/main/install.sh"
     sha256: "0c25aed6cce9d56ee0596c9a5df8cbe99ffd0f7a7054de0262234dd268b61404"
-
